75381.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 2
75381.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-2-oleh-bezuhlyi-mxraf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BZ%2F%2BBmiECTqeuL6PTzxh%2F9w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1xCUKtuXuossk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr3s3htp~3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr3s3htp-3
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Relief rally meets regulation: Bitcoin reclaims $61K on dovish Fed signals and weak jobs data, while Washington flexes sanctions muscle and global banks push deeper into stablecoins and tokenized stocks. 📈 Bitcoin Surges Past $61,000 as Inflation Fears Ease Bitcoin jumped more than 4% to trade above $61,000 — its strongest level in over a week — after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaled that inflation risks had softened and June payrolls came in at just 57,000 new jobs, well below forecasts. The dovish shift trimmed rate-hike bets and triggered over $437M in short liquidations, with smaller tokens leading what traders called the first real bounce of the selloff. Read full story 🚫 US Sanctions 134 ISIS-K Crypto Wallets, Tether Freezes Funds OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses tied to ISIS-K to its sanctions list — including 131 Tron addresses that collected over $1.4 million in donations — while Tether froze the associated funds in near real time. The action shows stablecoin issuers and on-chain analytics have effectively become part of the sanctions enforcement machine. More details 🏦 Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank With Direct USDC Access Standard Chartered is now the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutional clients mint and redeem Circle's USDC directly on banking rails, starting in Dubai's DIFC with global expansion planned. It's a landmark step in fusing regulated banking infrastructure with stablecoin liquidity. Read more ⚠️ JPMorgan Flags "Two-Way Risk" in Strategy's Bitcoin Sales Policy JPMorgan warned that Strategy's policy of selling Bitcoin adds avoidable uncertainty to crypto markets, arguing the company should instead issue equity to build cash reserves. Cantor Fitzgerald, by contrast, sees the firm's new Digital Credit Capital Framework driving the stock up 115% — a stark split in how Wall Street reads the biggest corporate BTC holder. See details 🔄 Nasdaq-Listed K Wave Media Dumps Entire Bitcoin Treasury for AI Korean media firm K Wave Media, which once lined up $1 billion to buy 10,000 BTC in a copy of Michael Saylor's playbook, confirmed in a filing that its Bitcoin balance is now zero. Debt repayment, collateral pressure, and a fight to keep its Nasdaq listing pushed the company into a full pivot to AI infrastructure — a cautionary tale f

75378.subject: As OpenAI Poaches Apple’s Best, You Can Get Exposure at a Lower Minimum
75378.body:
Spark Fund 2 has one of our lowest minimums for an OpenAI-led Fund

Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVT7YC98J8l9W8vTVVV8BqvPSW3hB9jJ5Q_NtMMfRflz3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p1W1gtllD5G-gYdW1SPXrw8SkMvYW8TZqdn8vV4mCW7dBDNR3yMkc0W43MsTQ7j_VZ8W88kWQz7d07F7W3Ds7Kl53Wz_4W61qPRH6l8ZnqW8By6QD3FZ-n2W8LtqKj6vdSzZW5tmHFy76z7ySW7ZR4B_8V76LXW5KTf5Y4m7lzTW5FJGhN7nD2h0W4DtRLy7D305-W7sXHVb8mgmcBW15GQRz4p6JvqW2JTqZh45cR9WW7WCLfp2Sz3hmW938-j_8D3MqsW4QZdDJ3fs69dW5tCszM4GSSQJW6_LVRh3rhLVDW34ZQsH5-19DWN1yQjFsc-BfRW2NqVdt8R5HB0VtMM0Y2ZnWWwW7m4Xcl1cFlrsf2YGhJT04 )

Hi Oleg,

Two new headlines from OpenAI dropped this week, and they point to some larger ambitions.

First: HP is now deploying OpenAI’s enterprise AI across its global operations, rolling out agents for customer support, software development, and internal operations across 180 countries.¹

HP is among a growing list of major enterprises — alongside Salesforce, Uber, PwC, and others — making OpenAI infrastructure a core part of how they do business.¹

Second: Paul Meade, the VP behind Apple’s Vision Pro and AI smart glasses program, recently accepted a role in OpenAI's hardware division.²

Meade joins a growing team that includes former Apple chief design officer Jony Ive, as OpenAI aims to build a “fundamentally calmer and more ambient alternative to the smartphone.”²

OpenAI is winning enterprise customers at scale and building a world-class hardware team, all while preparing for what could potentially be “one of the largest [IPOs] in history.”³

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur. There's no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for OpenAI, or that the company will be profitable.

With Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVT7YC98J8l9W8vTVVV8BqvPSW3hB9jJ5Q_NtMMfRflz3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p1W1gtllD5G-gYdW1SPXrw8SkMvYW8TZqdn8vV4mCW7dBDNR3yMkc0W43MsTQ7j_VZ8W88kWQz7d07F7W3Ds7Kl53Wz_4W61qPRH6l8ZnqW8By6QD3FZ-n2W8LtqKj6vdSzZW5tmHFy76z7ySW7ZR4B_8V76LXW5KTf5Y4m7lzTW5FJGhN7nD2h0W4DtRLy7D305-W7sXHVb8mgmcBW15GQRz4p6JvqW2JTqZh45cR9WW7WCLfp2Sz3hmW938-j_8D3MqsW4QZdDJ3fs69dW5tCszM4GSSQJW6_LVRh3rhLVDW34ZQsH5-19DWN1yQjFsc-BfRW2NqVdt8R5HB0VtMM0Y2ZnWWwW7m4Xcl1cFlrsf2YGhJT04 ) , accredited investors can gain exposure to OpenAI alongside a portfolio of companies at the frontier of AI, quantum computing, and digital assets, all with a single check.

And remember: that check can start at a lower minimum than many of our other Funds.

View the Spark Fund 2
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVT7YC98J8l9W8vTVVV8BqvPSW3hB9jJ5Q_NtMMfRflz3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p1W1gtllD5G-gYdW1SPXrw8SkMvYW8TZqdn8vV4mCW7dBDNR3yMkc0W43MsTQ7j_VZ8W88kWQz7d07F7W3Ds7Kl53Wz_4W61qPRH6l8ZnqW8By6QD3FZ-n2W8LtqKj6vdSzZW5tmHFy76z7ySW7ZR4B_8V76LXW5KTf5Y4m7lzTW5FJGhN7nD2h0W4DtRLy7D305-W7sXHVb8mgmcBW15GQRz4p6JvqW2JTqZh45cR9WW7WCLfp2Sz3hmW938-j_8D3MqsW4QZdDJ3fs69dW5tCszM4GSSQJW6_LVRh3rhLVDW34ZQsH5-19DWN1yQjFsc-Bf

75376.subject: Europe’s airport queues are very long—and getting longer
75376.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3p15c6NOXMRHkIexiawfRcuZEns8a3ucMLwYo_QKfK2TXpGRI9SCToo7DBo3z2S15tr2JzXQhvJEOC5K4oGwfIv9nryEUGcHphjNcVPQGha 

July 2nd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3p15c6OP2C9bnyCzPq8HpK0HK1hsx2SdJJ73c4FEg6zNhlN10xSBsQNbWiyUIk52kX40VAFwDuxGHO1u-vgwyubKwM2Y8XjemKr8LbTlYup 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3p15c6Po7fcp8s37TkZTcmO2N2PJm7AXnebJYHMtuDDVMffZLhiGkRSXvz12n2ltLQy-aL4N7V7W6WqKETDgx_mEt1KbOeSFikNW3ktuNvN 


 


 
 

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



 Heading to the Continent (as we folk in the United Kingdom call it)? Beware. European airport queues are long and getting longer. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3p15c6Q0uZ9IRwr5LUWT7hEe9yhyNaqboYNVrJt5z-xvwt9sTUgWp6-eeLfxvqcR5kzO6X57XblQysgf4L6NrtdB9vA40C-ZiKq6tE 
We preview —and
 explain—the misery.


 Transport and annoyance feature also in this week’s Schumpeter column, about how Lime bikes divide opinion among liberals. Some deem them paragons of liberal capitalism. To others they’re the devil. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3p15c6RBTPZMMyo4xdI54ywngGEOMeyOfwKk9gXZynK_FjlYFCwYtnBKOrEOKAkHwXMH5QszGz5o8dbC6RCngjz6q08G-a8it6bMYQ 
O

75370.subject: Financializing the AI Supply Chain
75370.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Hi all, and happy Thursday!

BTC, ETH, and SOL are trading well into the long weekend, with Strategy’s _Digital Credit Capital Framework _pulling precisely the levers needed to calm recent concerns. _ _

GPU compute has become a traded commodity almost overnight, but the real battle is shifting from who lists the contracts to who controls physical delivery.

Enjoy!

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Over the past week, majors have shown strength, with BTC up 3%, ETH up 5.3%, and SOL up 15% heading into the holiday weekend. The constructive price action of the majors is notable as it comes amidst ongoing weakness and outflows from the ETFs.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5901ebc1-64ef-485c-b9d3-2204d7c3eed2/image.png?t=1782996816)
Caption: 

 Crypto equities lead the board on the weekly, with the sector up 9.1%. Leaders here include FIGR, GEMI, HOOD, COIN, and BLSH. The Solana Ecosystem shows similar strength as the trenches were revived, with JTO and RAY trading up 12.5% and 9.7%, respectively. L2s are the top losers of the week, with WLD and MNT accounting for most of that downside, trading 32% and 16% lower.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/0a8f5df7-80ab-4f79-b8be-61f35d94e97d/image.png?t=1782996817)
Caption: 

Strategy’s [corporate actions](https://www.strategy.com/press/strategy-announces-digital-credit-capital-framework_06-29-2026), announced on Monday, implemented forward guidance precisely in line with what the market needed to see. The framework guided toward the use of 5 levers to support the prices of preferreds:

1. A USD Reserve Policy, requiring that the company hold the cash reserves required to cover a minimum of 12 months of dividend payments or interest expense.

2. An increase in the STRC dividend to 12%, payable semi-monthly. 

3. A repurchase program for up to $1B in repurchases of preferred stock.

4. A repurchase program for up to $1B in MSTR common stock.

5. A “BTC Monetization Program,” approving the sale of BTC to fund the USD reserve, preferred repurchases, and common repurchases.

At large, the actions taken show Strategy is willing to sell BTC to defend STRC, and price action since the announcement has supported this. Both MSTR and STRC have rallied significantly since Monday, outperforming BTC. BTC, as well, is trading in the green since this news.
